issues_found: Source is a listing_page/index page, not an archiveable document - violates Core Rule #5 (reject listing pages)
Source attribution URL is empty - violates requirement for valid source attribution
event_type set to 'research_paper' but source is a listing page, not a research paper - incorrect event type classification

Source contains no substantive content - only links to other documents spanning 1992-2019
Cannot extract macro catalysts, policy signals, or market-moving data from this format
human_review_reason: The record correctly identifies that this is a low-value listing page. Core rules explicitly mandate rejection for listing_page source types. No human review needed - verdict is clear-cut.

corrected_fields.summary: This source is a Treasury.gov index page listing various research documents on Treasury market structure and debt management, spanning multiple decades from 1992 to 2019. It is not a single coherent source but rather a navigation hub providing links to conference archives, joint staff reports, regulatory studies, and auction evaluations. No specific publication date is provided for the index itself.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This index has no standalone archival value as a macro catalyst or market structure source. Individual linked documents (e.g., the 2014 Joint Staff Report on October 15 volatility) would have significant archival value if retrieved separately.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: This source indexes multiple market structure documents but does not contain substantive content of those documents.
